section_header: 5.3.2 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Water Resources
policy_statement: Adaptation plan program: Improve the resilience of systems for the water sector, with an allocated budget of 6.2 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text:
| Improve the resilience of systems for the water sector |
...
“Budget         | 6.2 million USD”
“Responsibility | • Ministry of Electricity and Water • KISR. • Kuwait Environment Protection Authority (KEPA) • The General Secretariat of the Supreme Council for Planning and Development (SCPD) …”
extraction_rationale: Structured water-sector adaptation plan with multiple action items and a stated budget; appropriate as parent.

section_header: 5.3.2 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Water Resources

section_header: 5.3.2 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Water Resources
policy_statement: Adopt efficient irrigation methods to reduce water losses (medium-term action).
parent_statement: Adaptation plan program: Improve the resilience of systems for the water sector, with an allocated budget of 6.2 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text: “Medium-term actions … ▪ Adapt efficient irrigation methods to reduce water losses.”
extraction_rationale: Specific adaptation measure for irrigation efficiency.

section_header: 5.3.2 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Water Resources
policy_statement: Involve more environmentally sustainable methods of water treatment like reverse osmosis to lower net energy consumption (long-term action).
parent_statement: Adaptation plan program: Improve the resilience of systems for the water sector, with an allocated budget of 6.2 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text: “Long-term actions … ▪ Involve more environmentally sustainable methods of water treatment like Reverse osmosis, where the net energy consumption is lower than other methods.”
extraction_rationale: Specific technology shift proposed as long-term action.

section_header: 5.3.3 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Coastal Zone
policy_statement: Adaptation plan program: Enhance the resilience of coastal zones to face sea level rise (SLR) risks, with an allocated budget of 7.8 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text:
| Enhancing the resilience of coastal zones to face SLR risks |
...
“Budget                | 7.8 million USD”
“Responsibility        | • Kuwait Environment Protection Authority (KEPA) • The General Secretariat of the Supreme Council for Planning and Development (SCPD). • KISR …”
extraction_rationale: Structured coastal adaptation plan with multiple actions (short/medium/long-term) and a stated budget; serves as umbrella.

section_header: 5.3.3 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Coastal Zone
policy_statement: Develop vulnerability and risk assessment reports for coastal zones (short-term action).
parent_statement: Adaptation plan program: Enhance the resilience of coastal zones to face sea level rise (SLR) risks, with an allocated budget of 7.8 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text: “Short-term actions  ▪ Develop vulnerability and risk assessment reports”
extraction_rationale: Concrete deliverable listed as a short-term action.

section_header: 5.3.3 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Coastal Zone

section_header: 5.3.4 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Human Health Sector
policy_statement: Adaptation plan program: Enhance and build the capacity of the health sector to prepare for increased health risks due to climate change, with an allocated budget of 4.1 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text:
| Enhance and building the capacity of the health sector to be prepared for increased health risks due to climate change |
...
“Budget              | 4.1 million USD.”
“Responsibility      | Ministry of Health … KEPA. … Meteorological department - Civil Aviation”
extraction_rationale: Structured health-sector adaptation plan with multiple actions and a stated budget; serves as umbrella.

section_header: 5.3.4 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Human Health Sector
policy_statement: Adjust official working hours to avoid working during maximum daytime temperatures (short-term action, including studying and issuing a new threshold).
parent_statement: Adaptation plan program: Enhance and build the capacity of the health sector to prepare for increased health risks due to climate change, with an allocated budget of 4.1 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text: “Short term actions … ▪ Adjust the official working hours to avoid working during maximum temperatures in the day (study and issue a new threshold).”
extraction_rationale: Specific occupational-heat adaptation action listed in the plan.

section_header: 5.3.4 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Human Health Sector
policy_statement: Establish national health alerts for dust storms and heat waves (short-term action).
parent_statement: Adaptation plan program: Enhance and build the capacity of the health sector to prepare for increased health risks due to climate change, with an allocated budget of 4.1 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text: “Short term actions … ▪ Establishing national health alerts for dust storms and heat waves.”
extraction_rationale: Concrete early-warning/alert system commitment under short-term actions.

section_header: 5.3.4 Adaptation Plans to enhance the resilience of the Human Health Sector
policy_statement: Develop warning systems for extreme weather conditions combined with a communication strategy for alerts (medium-term action).
parent_statement: Adaptation plan program: Enhance and build the capacity of the health sector to prepare for increased health risks due to climate change, with an allocated budget of 4.1 million USD and identified responsible institutions.
verbatim_text: “Medium-term actions  ▪ Develop warning systems for extreme weather conditions combined with a communication strategy for alerts.”
extraction_rationale: Specific systems-based intervention with communication component.

policy_statement: Ban outdoor work from 11:00 AM to 16:00 PM during June through August under a national law issued in 2005 (occupational heat protection).
verbatim_text: “the Ministry of Social Affairs and Labor of Kuwait issued a national law in 2005 to stop any outdoor work from 11:00 AM to 16:00 PM during the months of June through August.”
extraction_rationale: Binding mechanism (national law) with specific time restriction and period.
